title: crotalaria andringitrensis
intro: Crotalaria andringitrensis is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae, native to Madagascar. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Crotalaria andringitrensis can be used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, although its safety and efficacy require further research and clinical trials.
